ingredients_text: Mash Potato (28%) [Water, Potato Flakes (Potatoes, Emulsifer (471), Acidity Regulator (330)), Milk Solids, Vegetable Spread (Soy), Salt, Butter (Milk), Spices, Natural Flavour (Milk)], Beef Rissoles (25%) [Beef (17%), Onion, Seasoning (Wheat Flour, Salt, Tapioca Starch, Emulsifier (451), Hydrolysed Soy Protein, Garlic, Spice, Spice Extract, Yeast Extract), Bread Crumb (Wheat), Vegetable Oil, Textured Soy Protein, Soy Protein Concentrate, Colour (150c)], Onion Gravy (20%) [Water, Onion, Thickener (1422), Sugar, Yeast Extract, Spices, Tomato Paste, Salt, Natural Flavour (Flavour Enhancers (627, 631)), Vegetable Oil, Malt Powder (Barley)], Carrot (14%), Peas (13%).
